case_title: DIANE HIDY et al VS. ART LOUIE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, ART

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HIDY, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, ART

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HIDY, DIANE SMITH, JOSEPH A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOUIE, ART $4,986.41 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,071.41, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IN THE SUM OF $3,330.00 PLUS INTEREST FOR JULY 1, 1998 THROUGH DECEMBER 20, 2009 IN THE SUM OF $1521.92 REDUCED BY DAMAGES BEYOND NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR IN THE SUM OF $365.51. PLAINTIFFS RECOVERY INCLUDES $500.00 DAMAGES PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5. IF DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY PAID INTEREST TO PLAINTIFFS DURING THE TENANCY, HE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR THOSE INTEREST PAYMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HIDY, DIANE SMITH, JOSEPH A. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, (W/AUTHORIZATION LETTER FROM JOSEPH A. SMITH)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, ART
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,300.00 FILED BY HIDY, DIANE SMITH, JOSEPH A. AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, ART ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
